raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX XXXX, XXXX, my wife XXXX XXXX and I checked into XXXX XXXX XXXX  in XXXX, OK on an XXXX 3 day reservation she had booked. We paid with my Citibank credit card # XXXX for {$420.00}. 

Several hours into our stay XXXX called us to say we must leave immediately. Apparently because of my past criminal history I'm not allowed to stay at an XXXX. So we left. The hostess assured us along with the XXXX representative that our money would be refunded. 

We never received a refund. I contacted Citibank to file a dispute. XXXX then replied to Citibank sending them a copy of the contract. Citibank refused to reimburse me. I never got to stay at the XXXX XXXX XXXX so why is XXXX allowed to charge me if they kick my wife and I out. 

I will to be reimbursed my {$420.00} from XXXX that they stole from us.
